sEn: Layer normalization normalizes neuron inputs across features within a single training case, stabilizing recurrent network training.
sZh: 层归一化对单个训练样本中同一层的所有神经元输入进行归一化，有效稳定循环网络的训练过程。
absEn: Training state-of-the-art, deep neural networks is computationally expensive. One way to reduce the training time is to normalize the activities of the neurons. A recently introduced technique called batch normalization uses the distribution of the summed input to a neuron over a mini-batch of training cases to compute a mean and variance which are then used to normalize the summed input to that neuron on each training case. This significantly reduces the training time in feed-forward neural networks. However, the effect of batch normalization is dependent on the mini-batch size and it is not obvious how to apply it to recurrent neural networks. In this paper, we transpose batch normalization into layer normalization by computing the mean and variance used for normalization from all of the summed inputs to the neurons in a layer on a single training case. Like batch normalization, we also give each neuron its own adaptive bias and gain which are applied after the normalization but before the non-linearity. Unlike batch normalization, layer normalization performs exactly the same computation at training and test times. It is also straightforward to apply to recurrent neural networks by computing the normalization statistics separately at each time step. Layer normalization is very effective at stabilizing the hidden state dynamics in recurrent networks. Empirically, we show that layer normalization can substantially reduce the training time compared with previously published techniques.
absZh: 训练最先进的深度神经网络计算成本高昂。减少训练时间的一种方法是归一化神经元的活动。最近引入的批归一化技术利用小批量训练样本中神经元求和输入的分布来计算均值和方差，进而对每个训练样本的求和输入进行归一化，这显著减少了前馈神经网络的训练时间。然而，批归一化的效果依赖于小批量大小，并且如何将其应用于循环神经网络尚不明确。本文通过从单个训练样本中一层所有神经元的求和输入计算用于归一化的均值和方差，将批归一化转化为层归一化。与批归一化类似，我们为每个神经元赋予自适应的偏置和增益，在归一化之后、非线性激活之前应用。与批归一化不同，层归一化在训练和测试时执行完全相同的计算。通过在每个时间步分别计算归一化统计量，层归一化也易于应用于循环神经网络。层归一化在稳定循环网络的隐藏状态动态方面非常有效。实验表明，与先前发表的技术相比，层归一化可以显著减少训练时间。

contrib.en: Proposes layer normalization, computing mean and variance from all summed inputs in a layer per training case.
contrib.zh: 提出层归一化，对单个训练样本的层内所有求和输入计算均值和方差。

contrib.en: Layer normalization works for RNNs by computing normalization statistics separately at each time step.
contrib.zh: 层归一化通过在每个时间步分别计算归一化统计量，适用于循环神经网络。

contrib.en: Layer normalization stabilizes hidden state dynamics in recurrent networks, reducing training time.
contrib.zh: 层归一化稳定循环网络中的隐藏状态动态，减少训练时间。

contrib.en: Empirically shows faster convergence and better generalization on multiple tasks including QA and language modeling.
contrib.zh: 实验表明在问答和语言建模等多个任务上收敛更快且泛化更好。

contrib.en: Layer normalization is invariant to re-scaling of entire weight matrix and per-case feature shifting.
contrib.zh: 层归一化对整体权重矩阵的缩放和每个样本的特征平移具有不变性。

contrib.en: Layer normalization is robust to small mini-batch sizes and online learning settings.
contrib.zh: 层归一化对小批量大小和在线学习设置具有鲁棒性。

limits.en: Layer normalization underperforms batch normalization in convolutional neural networks.
limits.zh: 层归一化在卷积神经网络中表现不如批归一化。

limits.en: The method assumes hidden units in a layer contribute similarly, which may not hold for CNNs.
limits.zh: 该方法假设层内隐藏单元贡献相似，这在CNN中可能不成立。

limits.en: Layer normalization is not invariant to individual weight vector scaling, unlike batch normalization.
limits.zh: 与批归一化不同，层归一化对单个权重向量的缩放不具有不变性。

limits.en: Theoretical analysis is limited to generalized linear models and may not fully capture deep network behavior.
limits.zh: 理论分析局限于广义线性模型，可能无法完全捕捉深度网络行为。

limits.en: Empirical evaluation focuses on RNNs; feed-forward and CNN results are less comprehensive.
limits.zh: 实验评估主要针对RNN，前馈和CNN的结果不够全面。

items.en: Training state-of-the-art, deep neural networks is computationally expensive. One way to reduce the training time is to normalize the activities of the neurons. A recently introduced technique called batch normalization uses the distribution of the summed input to a neuron over a mini-batch of training cases to compute a mean and variance which are then used to normalize the summed input to that neuron on each training case. This significantly reduces the training time in feed-forward neural networks. However, the effect of batch normalization is dependent on the mini-batch size and it is not obvious how to apply it to recurrent neural networks. In this paper, we transpose batch normalization into layer normalization by computing the mean and variance used for normalization from all of the summed inputs to the neurons in a layer on a single training case. Like batch normalization, we also give each neuron its own adaptive bias and gain which are applied after the normalization but before the non-linearity. Unlike batch normalization, layer normalization performs exactly the same computation at training and test times. It is also straightforward to apply to recurrent neural networks by computing the normalization statistics separately at each time step. Layer normalization is very effective at stabilizing the hidden state dynamics in recurrent networks. Empirically, we show that layer normalization can substantially reduce the training time compared with previously published techniques.
items.zh: 训练最先进的深度神经网络计算成本高昂。减少训练时间的一种方法是归一化神经元的活动。最近引入的一种称为批量归一化的技术，利用小批量训练案例中神经元求和输入的分布来计算均值和方差，然后用于归一化每个训练案例中该神经元的求和输入。这显著减少了前馈神经网络的训练时间。然而，批量归一化的效果依赖于小批量大小，并且如何将其应用于循环神经网络并不明显。在本文中，我们通过从单个训练案例中一层内所有神经元的求和输入计算用于归一化的均值和方差，将批量归一化转换为层归一化。与批量归一化类似，我们也为每个神经元赋予其自适应的偏置和增益，这些在归一化之后、非线性之前应用。与批量归一化不同，层归一化在训练和测试时执行完全相同的计算。通过在每个时间步分别计算归一化统计量，它也很容易应用于循环神经网络。层归一化在稳定循环网络中的隐藏状态动态方面非常有效。实验表明，与先前发表的技术相比，层归一化可以大幅减少训练时间。

items.en: Deep neural networks trained with some version of Stochastic Gradient Descent have been shown to substantially outperform previous approaches on various supervised learning tasks in computer vision [Krizhevsky et al., 2012] and speech processing [Hinton et al., 2012]. But state-of-the-art deep neural networks often require many days of training. It is possible to speed-up the learning by computing gradients for different subsets of the training cases on different machines or splitting the neural network itself over many machines [Dean et al., 2012], but this can require a lot of communication and complex software. It also tends to lead to rapidly diminishing returns as the degree of parallelization increases. An orthogonal approach is to modify the computations performed in the forward pass of the neural net to make learning easier. Recently, batch normalization [Ioffe and Szegedy, 2015] has been proposed to reduce training time by including additional normalization stages in deep neural networks. The normalization standardizes each summed input using its mean and its standard deviation across the training data. Feedforward neural networks trained using batch normalization converge faster even with simple SGD. In addition to training time improvement, the stochasticity from the batch statistics serves as a regularizer during training.
items.zh: 使用某种随机梯度下降版本训练的深度神经网络已被证明在计算机视觉[Krizhevsky et al., 2012]和语音处理[Hinton et al., 2012]的各种监督学习任务上显著优于先前的方法。但最先进的深度神经网络通常需要多天的训练。可以通过在不同机器上计算不同训练案例子集的梯度，或将神经网络本身分割到多台机器上来加速学习[Dean et al., 2012]，但这可能需要大量的通信和复杂的软件。随着并行化程度的提高，它也往往导致收益迅速递减。另一种正交的方法是修改神经网络前向传播中执行的计算，以使学习更容易。最近，批量归一化[Ioffe and Szegedy, 2015]被提出，通过在深度神经网络中加入额外的归一化阶段来减少训练时间。归一化使用训练数据中每个求和输入的均值和标准差对其进行标准化。使用批量归一化训练的前馈神经网络即使使用简单的SGD也能更快收敛。除了训练时间的改善，批量统计量的随机性在训练期间起到了正则化作用。

items.en: Despite its simplicity, batch normalization requires running averages of the summed input statistics. In feed-forward networks with fixed depth, it is straightforward to store the statistics separately for each hidden layer. However, the summed inputs to the recurrent neurons in a recurrent neural network (RNN) often vary with the length of the sequence so applying batch normalization to RNNs appears to require different statistics for different time-steps. Furthermore, batch normalization cannot be applied to online learning tasks or to extremely large distributed models where the minibatches have to be small.
items.zh: 尽管批量归一化很简单，但它需要求和输入统计量的运行平均值。在固定深度的前馈网络中，为每个隐藏层分别存储统计量是直接的。然而，循环神经网络中循环神经元的求和输入通常随序列长度变化，因此将批量归一化应用于RNN似乎需要针对不同时间步使用不同的统计量。此外，批量归一化无法应用于在线学习任务或小批量必须很小的超大规模分布式模型。

items.en: This paper introduces layer normalization, a simple normalization method to improve the training speed for various neural network models. Unlike batch normalization, the proposed method directly estimates the normalization statistics from the summed inputs to the neurons within a hidden layer so the normalization does not introduce any new dependencies between training cases. We show that layer normalization works well for RNNs and improves both the training time and the generalization performance of several existing RNN models.
items.zh: 本文介绍了层归一化，一种简单的归一化方法，用于提高各种神经网络模型的训练速度。与批量归一化不同，所提出的方法直接从隐藏层内神经元的求和输入估计归一化统计量，因此归一化不会在训练案例之间引入任何新的依赖关系。我们表明层归一化对RNN效果良好，并提高了几种现有RNN模型的训练时间和泛化性能。

items.en: A feed-forward neural network is a non-linear mapping from a input pattern 𝕩𝕩{\mathbb{x}} to an output vector y𝑦y. Consider the lt​hsuperscript𝑙𝑡ℎl^{th} hidden layer in a deep feed-forward, neural network, and let alsuperscript𝑎𝑙{a}^{l} be the vector representation of the summed inputs to the neurons in that layer. The summed inputs are computed through a linear projection with the weight matrix Wlsuperscript𝑊𝑙{W}^{l} and the bottom-up inputs hlsuperscriptℎ𝑙{h}^{l} given as follows:
items.zh: 前馈神经网络是从输入模式𝕩到输出向量y的非线性映射。考虑深度前馈神经网络中的第l个隐藏层，令a^l为该层神经元求和输入的向量表示。求和输入通过权重矩阵W^l的线性投影和自底向上的输入h^l计算如下：

items.en: where f​(⋅)𝑓⋅{f}(\cdot) is an element-wise non-linear function and wilsubscriptsuperscript𝑤𝑙𝑖{w}^{l}_{i} is the incoming weights to the it​hsuperscript𝑖𝑡ℎi^{th} hidden units and bilsubscriptsuperscript𝑏𝑙𝑖{b}^{l}_{i} is the scalar bias parameter. The parameters in the neural network are learnt using gradient-based optimization algorithms with the gradients being computed by back-propagation.
items.zh: 其中f(·)是逐元素的非线性函数，w_i^l是第i个隐藏单元的传入权重，b_i^l是标量偏置参数。神经网络中的参数使用基于梯度的优化算法学习，梯度通过反向传播计算。

items.en: One of the challenges of deep learning is that the gradients with respect to the weights in one layer are highly dependent on the outputs of the neurons in the previous layer especially if these outputs change in a highly correlated way. Batch normalization [Ioffe and Szegedy, 2015] was proposed to reduce such undesirable “covariate shift”. The method normalizes the summed inputs to each hidden unit over the training cases. Specifically, for the it​hsuperscript𝑖𝑡ℎi^{th} summed input in the lt​hsuperscript𝑙𝑡ℎl^{th} layer, the batch normalization method rescales the summed inputs according to their variances under the distribution of the data
items.zh: 深度学习的挑战之一是一层中权重的梯度高度依赖于前一层神经元的输出，尤其是当这些输出以高度相关的方式变化时。批量归一化[Ioffe and Szegedy, 2015]被提出来减少这种不良的“协变量偏移”。该方法在训练案例上归一化每个隐藏单元的求和输入。具体来说，对于第l层中的第i个求和输入，批量归一化方法根据其在数据分布下的方差重新缩放求和输入

items.en: where a¯ilsubscriptsuperscript¯𝑎𝑙𝑖\bar{{a}}^{l}_{i} is normalized summed inputs to the it​hsuperscript𝑖𝑡ℎi^{th} hidden unit in the lt​hsuperscript𝑙𝑡ℎl^{th} layer and gisubscript𝑔𝑖g_{i} is a gain parameter scaling the normalized activation before the non-linear activation function. Note the expectation is under the whole training data distribution. It is typically impractical to compute the expectations in Eq. (2) exactly, since it would require forward passes through the whole training dataset with the current set of weights. Instead, μ𝜇\mu and σ𝜎\sigma are estimated using the empirical samples from the current mini-batch. This puts constraints on the size of a mini-batch and it is hard to apply to recurrent neural networks.
items.zh: 其中ā_i^l是第l层第i个隐藏单元归一化后的求和输入，g_i是在非线性激活函数之前缩放归一化激活的增益参数。注意期望是在整个训练数据分布下。精确计算式(2)中的期望通常不切实际，因为它需要以当前权重集对整个训练数据集进行前向传播。相反，μ和σ使用当前小批量的经验样本估计。这对小批量的大小施加了约束，并且难以应用于循环神经网络。

items.en: We now consider the layer normalization method which is designed to overcome the drawbacks of batch normalization.
items.zh: 现在我们考虑层归一化方法，旨在克服批量归一化的缺点。

items.en: Notice that changes in the output of one layer will tend to cause highly correlated changes in the summed inputs to the next layer, especially with ReLU units whose outputs can change by a lot. This suggests the “covariate shift” problem can be reduced by fixing the mean and the variance of the summed inputs within each layer. We, thus, compute the layer normalization statistics over all the hidden units in the same layer as follows:
items.zh: 注意，一层输出的变化往往会导致下一层求和输入的高度相关变化，尤其是对于输出可能变化很大的ReLU单元。这表明通过固定每层内求和输入的均值和方差可以减少“协变量偏移”问题。因此，我们按如下方式计算同一层内所有隐藏单元的层归一化统计量：

items.en: where H𝐻H denotes the number of hidden units in a layer. The difference between Eq. (2) and Eq. (3) is that under layer normalization, all the hidden units in a layer share the same normalization terms μ𝜇\mu and σ𝜎\sigma, but different training cases have different normalization terms. Unlike batch normalization, layer normaliztion does not impose any constraint on the size of a mini-batch and it can be used in the pure online regime with batch size 1.
items.zh: 其中H表示一层中的隐藏单元数。式(2)和式(3)的区别在于，在层归一化下，一层中的所有隐藏单元共享相同的归一化项μ和σ，但不同的训练案例具有不同的归一化项。与批量归一化不同，层归一化不对小批量的大小施加任何约束，并且可以在批量大小为1的纯在线模式下使用。

full.secZh: 3.1 层归一化循环神经网络

items.en: The recent sequence to sequence models [Sutskever et al., 2014] utilize compact recurrent neural networks to solve sequential prediction problems in natural language processing. It is common among the NLP tasks to have different sentence lengths for different training cases. This is easy to deal with in an RNN because the same weights are used at every time-step. But when we apply batch normalization to an RNN in the obvious way, we need to to compute and store separate statistics for each time step in a sequence. This is problematic if a test sequence is longer than any of the training sequences. Layer normalization does not have such problem because its normalization terms depend only on the summed inputs to a layer at the current time-step. It also has only one set of gain and bias parameters shared over all time-steps.
items.zh: 最近的序列到序列模型[Sutskever et al., 2014]利用紧凑的循环神经网络来解决自然语言处理中的序列预测问题。在NLP任务中，不同训练案例的句子长度不同是常见的。这在RNN中很容易处理，因为每个时间步使用相同的权重。但是，当我们以明显的方式将批量归一化应用于RNN时，我们需要为序列中的每个时间步计算和存储单独的统计量。如果测试序列比任何训练序列都长，这就有问题。层归一化没有这个问题，因为其归一化项仅依赖于当前时间步一层的求和输入。它也只有一组在所有时间步共享的增益和偏置参数。

items.en: In a standard RNN, the summed inputs in the recurrent layer are computed from the current input 𝕩tsuperscript𝕩𝑡{\mathbb{x}}^{t} and previous vector of hidden states 𝕙t−1superscript𝕙𝑡1{\mathbb{h}}^{t-1} which are computed as 𝕒t=Wh​h​ht−1+Wx​h​𝕩tsuperscript𝕒𝑡subscript𝑊ℎℎsuperscriptℎ𝑡1subscript𝑊𝑥ℎsuperscript𝕩𝑡{\mathbb{a}}^{t}={W}_{hh}{h}^{t-1}+{W}_{xh}{\mathbb{x}}^{t}. The layer normalized recurrent layer re-centers and re-scales its activations using the extra normalization terms similar to Eq. (3):
items.zh: 在标准RNN中，循环层的求和输入由当前输入𝕩^t和先前的隐藏状态向量𝕙^{t-1}计算，即𝕒^t = W_{hh} h^{t-1} + W_{xh} 𝕩^t。层归一化的循环层使用类似于式(3)的额外归一化项重新中心和重新缩放其激活：

items.en: where Wh​hsubscript𝑊ℎℎ{W}_{hh} is the recurrent hidden to hidden weights and Wx​hsubscript𝑊𝑥ℎ{W}_{xh} are the bottom up input to hidden weights. ⊙direct-product\odot is the element-wise multiplication between two vectors. 𝕓𝕓{\mathbb{b}} and 𝕘𝕘{\mathbb{g}} are defined as the bias and gain parameters of the same dimension as 𝕙tsuperscript𝕙𝑡{\mathbb{h}}^{t}.
items.zh: 其中W_{hh}是循环隐藏到隐藏权重，W_{xh}是自底向上输入到隐藏权重。⊙是两个向量之间的逐元素乘法。𝕓和𝕘定义为与𝕙^t相同维度的偏置和增益参数。

items.en: In a standard RNN, there is a tendency for the average magnitude of the summed inputs to the recurrent units to either grow or shrink at every time-step, leading to exploding or vanishing gradients. In a layer normalized RNN, the normalization terms make it invariant to re-scaling all of the summed inputs to a layer, which results in much more stable hidden-to-hidden dynamics.
items.zh: 在标准RNN中，循环单元求和输入的平均幅度在每个时间步有增长或缩小的趋势，导致梯度爆炸或消失。在层归一化的RNN中，归一化项使其对一层所有求和输入的重新缩放保持不变，从而产生更稳定的隐藏到隐藏动态。

items.en: Batch normalization has been previously extended to recurrent neural networks [Laurent et al., 2015, Amodei et al., 2015, Cooijmans et al., 2016]. The previous work [Cooijmans et al., 2016] suggests the best performance of recurrent batch normalization is obtained by keeping independent normalization statistics for each time-step. The authors show that initializing the gain parameter in the recurrent batch normalization layer to 0.1 makes significant difference in the final performance of the model. Our work is also related to weight normalization [Salimans and Kingma, 2016]. In weight normalization, instead of the variance, the L2 norm of the incoming weights is used to normalize the summed inputs to a neuron. Applying either weight normalization or batch normalization using expected statistics is equivalent to have a different parameterization of the original feed-forward neural network. Re-parameterization in the ReLU network was studied in the Path-normalized SGD [Neyshabur et al., 2015]. Our proposed layer normalization method, however, is not a re-parameterization of the original neural network. The layer normalized model, thus, has different invariance properties than the other methods, that we will study in the following section.
items.zh: 批量归一化先前已被扩展到循环神经网络[Laurent et al., 2015, Amodei et al., 2015, Cooijmans et al., 2016]。先前的工作[Cooijmans et al., 2016]表明，循环批量归一化的最佳性能是通过为每个时间步保持独立的归一化统计量获得的。作者表明，将循环批量归一化层中的增益参数初始化为0.1对模型的最终性能有显著影响。我们的工作也与权重归一化[Salimans and Kingma, 2016]相关。在权重归一化中，使用传入权重的L2范数而不是方差来归一化神经元的求和输入。使用期望统计量应用权重归一化或批量归一化等价于对原始前馈神经网络进行不同的参数化。ReLU网络中的重参数化在路径归一化SGD[Neyshabur et al., 2015]中进行了研究。然而，我们提出的层归一化方法不是原始神经网络的重参数化。因此，层归一化模型具有与其他方法不同的不变性属性，我们将在下一节中研究。

items.en: In this section, we investigate the invariance properties of different normalization schemes.
items.zh: 在本节中，我们研究不同归一化方案的不变性属性。

full.sec: 5.1 Invariance under weights and data transformations
full.secZh: 5.1 权重与数据变换下的不变性

items.en: The proposed layer normalization is related to batch normalization and weight normalization. Although, their normalization scalars are computed differently, these methods can be summarized as normalizing the summed inputs aisubscript𝑎𝑖a_{i} to a neuron through the two scalars μ𝜇\mu and σ𝜎\sigma. They also learn an adaptive bias b𝑏b and gain g𝑔g for each neuron after the normalization.
items.zh: 提出的层归一化与批量归一化和权重归一化相关。尽管它们的归一化标量计算方式不同，但这些方法可以概括为通过两个标量μ和σ归一化神经元的求和输入a_i。它们还在归一化后为每个神经元学习自适应的偏置b和增益g。

items.en: Note that for layer normalization and batch normalization, μ𝜇\mu and σ𝜎\sigma is computed according to Eq. 2 and 3. In weight normalization, μ𝜇\mu is 0, and σ=‖w‖2𝜎subscriptnorm𝑤2\sigma=\|{w}\|_{2}.
items.zh: 注意，对于层归一化和批量归一化，μ和σ根据式2和3计算。在权重归一化中，μ为0，σ = ‖w‖_2。

items.en: Weight re-scaling and re-centering: First, observe that under batch normalization and weight normalization, any re-scaling to the incoming weights wisubscript𝑤𝑖{w}_{i} of a single neuron has no effect on the normalized summed inputs to a neuron. To be precise, under batch and weight normalization, if the weight vector is scaled by δ𝛿\delta, the two scalar μ𝜇\mu and σ𝜎\sigma will also be scaled by δ𝛿\delta. The normalized summed inputs stays the same before and after scaling. So the batch and weight normalization are invariant to the re-scaling of the weights. Layer normalization, on the other hand, is not invariant to the individual scaling of the single weight vectors. Instead, layer normalization is invariant to scaling of the entire weight matrix and invariant to a shift to all of the incoming weights in the weight matrix. Let there be two sets of model parameters θ𝜃\theta, θ′superscript𝜃′\theta^{\prime} whose weight matrices W𝑊W and W′superscript𝑊′W^{\prime} differ by a scaling factor δ𝛿\delta and all of the incoming weights in W′superscript𝑊′W^{\prime} are also shifted by a constant vector 𝜸𝜸\bm{\gamma}, that is W′=δ​W+𝟏​𝜸⊤superscript𝑊′𝛿𝑊1superscript𝜸topW^{\prime}=\delta W+{\bf 1}{\bm{\gamma}}^{\top}. Under layer normalization, the two models effectively compute the same output:
items.zh: 权重重新缩放和重新中心：首先，观察在批量归一化和权重归一化下，对单个神经元传入权重w_i的任何重新缩放对神经元的归一化求和输入没有影响。准确地说，在批量和权重归一化下，如果权重向量被缩放δ，两个标量μ和σ也将被缩放δ。归一化后的求和输入在缩放前后保持不变。因此，批量和权重归一化对权重的重新缩放是不变的。另一方面，层归一化对单个权重向量的单独缩放不是不变的。相反，层归一化对整个权重矩阵的缩放是不变的，并且对权重矩阵中所有传入权重的平移是不变的。设两组模型参数θ和θ'，其权重矩阵W和W'相差一个缩放因子δ，并且W'中的所有传入权重还平移了一个常数向量𝜸，即W' = δW + 𝟏𝜸^⊤。在层归一化下，这两个模型有效地计算相同的输出：

items.en: Notice that if normalization is only applied to the input before the weights, the model will not be invariant to re-scaling and re-centering of the weights.
items.zh: 注意，如果归一化仅应用于权重之前的输入，模型将不会对权重的重新缩放和重新中心化保持不变。

items.en: Data re-scaling and re-centering: We can show that all the normalization methods are invariant to re-scaling the dataset by verifying that the summed inputs of neurons stays constant under the changes. Furthermore, layer normalization is invariant to re-scaling of individual training cases, because the normalization scalars μ𝜇\mu and σ𝜎\sigma in Eq. (3) only depend on the current input data. Let 𝕩′superscript𝕩′{\mathbb{x}}^{\prime} be a new data point obtained by re-scaling 𝕩𝕩{\mathbb{x}} by δ𝛿\delta. Then we have,
items.zh: 数据重新缩放和重新中心化：我们可以证明，所有归一化方法对数据集的重新缩放保持不变，通过验证在变化下神经元的求和输入保持恒定。此外，层归一化对单个训练样本的重新缩放保持不变，因为式(3)中的归一化标量μ和σ仅依赖于当前输入数据。设𝕩'是通过δ重新缩放𝕩得到的新数据点。那么我们有：

items.en: It is easy to see re-scaling individual data points does not change the model’s prediction under layer normalization. Similar to the re-centering of the weight matrix in layer normalization, we can also show that batch normalization is invariant to re-centering of the dataset.
items.zh: 容易看出，在层归一化下，重新缩放单个数据点不会改变模型的预测。类似于层归一化中权重矩阵的重新中心化，我们也可以证明批归一化对数据集的重新中心化保持不变。

full.sec: 5.2 Geometry of parameter space during learning
full.secZh: 5.2 学习过程中参数空间的几何结构

items.en: We have investigated the invariance of the model’s prediction under re-centering and re-scaling of the parameters. Learning, however, can behave very differently under different parameterizations, even though the models express the same underlying function. In this section, we analyze learning behavior through the geometry and the manifold of the parameter space. We show that the normalization scalar σ𝜎\sigma can implicitly reduce learning rate and makes learning more stable.
items.zh: 我们研究了模型预测在参数重新中心化和重新缩放下的不变性。然而，即使模型表达相同的底层函数，学习在不同参数化下可能表现非常不同。在本节中，我们通过参数空间的几何和流形分析学习行为。我们表明归一化标量σ可以隐式降低学习率，使学习更加稳定。

items.en: The learnable parameters in a statistical model form a smooth manifold that consists of all possible input-output relations of the model. For models whose output is a probability distribution, a natural way to measure the separation of two points on this manifold is the Kullback-Leibler divergence between their model output distributions. Under the KL divergence metric, the parameter space is a Riemannian manifold.
items.zh: 统计模型中的可学习参数形成一个光滑流形，由模型所有可能的输入-输出关系组成。对于输出为概率分布的模型，测量该流形上两点分离的自然方式是它们模型输出分布之间的Kullback-Leibler散度。在KL散度度量下，参数空间是一个黎曼流形。

items.en: The curvature of a Riemannian manifold is entirely captured by its Riemannian metric, whose quadratic form is denoted as d​s2𝑑superscript𝑠2ds^{2}. That is the infinitesimal distance in the tangent space at a point in the parameter space. Intuitively, it measures the changes in the model output from the parameter space along a tangent direction. The Riemannian metric under KL was previously studied [Amari, 1998] and was shown to be well approximated under second order Taylor expansion using the Fisher information matrix:
items.zh: 黎曼流形的曲率完全由其黎曼度量捕获，其二次形式记为ds²。即参数空间中某点切空间中的无穷小距离。直观上，它测量沿切线方向参数空间变化引起的模型输出变化。KL下的黎曼度量先前已被研究[Amari, 1998]，并表明在二阶泰勒展开下可以用Fisher信息矩阵很好地近似：

items.en: where, δ𝛿\delta is a small change to the parameters. The Riemannian metric above presents a geometric view of parameter spaces. The following analysis of the Riemannian metric provides some insight into how normalization methods could help in training neural networks.
items.zh: 其中，δ是参数的微小变化。上述黎曼度量提供了参数空间的几何视角。以下对黎曼度量的分析为归一化方法如何帮助训练神经网络提供了一些见解。

items.en: We focus our geometric analysis on the generalized linear model. The results from the following analysis can be easily applied to understand deep neural networks with block-diagonal approximation to the Fisher information matrix, where each block corresponds to the parameters for a single neuron.
items.zh: 我们将几何分析集中在广义线性模型上。以下分析的结果可以轻松应用于理解深度神经网络，通过Fisher信息矩阵的分块对角近似，其中每个块对应单个神经元的参数。

items.en: A generalized linear model (GLM) can be regarded as parameterizing an output distribution from the exponential family using a weight vector w𝑤w and bias scalar b𝑏b. To be consistent with the previous sections, the log likelihood of the GLM can be written using the summed inputs a𝑎a as the following:
items.zh: 广义线性模型（GLM）可以被视为使用权重向量w和偏置标量b对指数族输出分布进行参数化。为了与前面章节一致，GLM的对数似然可以使用求和输入a写成如下形式：

items.en: where, f​(⋅)𝑓⋅f(\cdot) is the transfer function that is the analog of the non-linearity in neural networks, f′​(⋅)superscript𝑓′⋅f^{\prime}(\cdot) is the derivative of the transfer function, η​(⋅)𝜂⋅\eta(\cdot) is a real valued function and c​(⋅)𝑐⋅c(\cdot) is the log partition function. ϕitalic-ϕ\phi is a constant that scales the output variance. Assume a H𝐻H-dimensional output vector 𝕪=[y1,y2,⋯,yH]𝕪subscript𝑦1subscript𝑦2⋯subscript𝑦𝐻{\mathbb{y}}=[y_{1},y_{2},\cdots,y_{H}] is modeled using H𝐻H independent GLMs and log⁡P​(𝕪|𝕩;W,𝕓)=∑i=1Hlog⁡P​(yi|𝕩;wi,bi)𝑃conditional𝕪𝕩𝑊𝕓superscriptsubscript𝑖1𝐻𝑃conditionalsubscript𝑦𝑖𝕩subscript𝑤𝑖subscript𝑏𝑖\log P({\mathbb{y}}\,|\,{\mathbb{x}};\ W,{\mathbb{b}})=\sum_{i=1}^{H}\log P(y_{i}\,|\,{\mathbb{x}};\ w_{i},b_{i}). Let W𝑊W be the weight matrix whose rows are the weight vectors of the individual GLMs, 𝕓𝕓{\mathbb{b}} denote the bias vector of length H𝐻H and vec⁡(⋅)vec⋅\operatorname{vec}(\cdot) denote the Kronecker vector operator. The Fisher information matrix for the multi-dimensional GLM with respect to its parameters θ=[w1⊤,b1,⋯,wH⊤,bH]⊤=vec⁡([W,𝕓]⊤)𝜃superscriptsuperscriptsubscript𝑤1topsubscript𝑏1⋯superscriptsubscript𝑤𝐻topsubscript𝑏𝐻topvecsuperscript𝑊𝕓top\theta=[{w}_{1}^{\top},{b}_{1},\cdots,{w}_{H}^{\top},{b}_{H}]^{\top}=\operatorname{vec}([W,{\mathbb{b}}]^{\top}) is simply the expected Kronecker product of the data features and the output covariance matrix:
items.zh: 其中，f(·)是传递函数，类似于神经网络中的非线性，f'(·)是传递函数的导数，η(·)是实值函数，c(·)是对数配分函数。φ是缩放输出方差的常数。假设一个H维输出向量𝕪=[y1,y2,...,yH]使用H个独立的GLM建模，且log P(𝕪|𝕩;W,𝕓)=∑_{i=1}^H log P(y_i|𝕩;w_i,b_i)。设W为权重矩阵，其行是各个GLM的权重向量，𝕓表示长度为H的偏置向量，vec(·)表示Kronecker向量算子。多维GLM关于其参数θ=[w_1^⊤,b_1,...,w_H^⊤,b_H]^⊤=vec([W,𝕓]^⊤)的Fisher信息矩阵就是数据特征与输出协方差矩阵的期望Kronecker积：

items.en: We obtain normalized GLMs by applying the normalization methods to the summed inputs a𝑎a in the original model through μ𝜇\mu and σ𝜎\sigma. Without loss of generality, we denote F¯¯𝐹\bar{{F}} as the Fisher information matrix under the normalized multi-dimensional GLM with the additional gain parameters θ=vec⁡([W,𝕓,𝕘]⊤)𝜃vecsuperscript𝑊𝕓𝕘top\theta=\operatorname{vec}([W,{\mathbb{b}},{\mathbb{g}}]^{\top}):
items.zh: 我们通过将归一化方法应用于原始模型中的求和输入a（通过μ和σ）来获得归一化GLM。不失一般性，我们记F̄为归一化多维GLM下带有额外增益参数θ=vec([W,𝕓,𝕘]^⊤)的Fisher信息矩阵：

items.en: Implicit learning rate reduction through the growth of the weight vector: Notice that, comparing to standard GLM, the block F¯i​jsubscript¯𝐹𝑖𝑗\bar{{F}}_{ij} along the weight vector wisubscript𝑤𝑖w_{i} direction is scaled by the gain parameters and the normalization scalar σisubscript𝜎𝑖\sigma_{i}. If the norm of the weight vector wisubscript𝑤𝑖w_{i} grows twice as large, even though the model’s output remains the same, the Fisher information matrix will be different. The curvature along the wisubscript𝑤𝑖w_{i} direction will change by a factor of 1212\frac{1}{2} because the σisubscript𝜎𝑖\sigma_{i} will also be twice as large. As a result, for the same parameter update in the normalized model, the norm of the weight vector effectively controls the learning rate for the weight vector. During learning, it is harder to change the orientation of the weight vector with large norm. The normalization methods, therefore, have an implicit “early stopping” effect on the weight vectors and help to stabilize learning towards convergence.
items.zh: 通过权重向量增长实现的隐式学习率降低：注意，与标准GLM相比，沿权重向量w_i方向的块F̄_{ij}被增益参数和归一化标量σ_i缩放。如果权重向量w_i的范数增长两倍，即使模型输出保持不变，Fisher信息矩阵也会不同。沿w_i方向的曲率将改变1/2倍，因为σ_i也会变为两倍。因此，对于归一化模型中的相同参数更新，权重向量的范数有效控制了权重向量的学习率。在学习过程中，改变大范数权重向量的方向更加困难。因此，归一化方法对权重向量具有隐式的“早停”效应，有助于稳定学习直至收敛。

items.en: Learning the magnitude of incoming weights: In normalized models, the magnitude of the incoming weights is explicitly parameterized by the gain parameters. We compare how the model output changes between updating the gain parameters in the normalized GLM and updating the magnitude of the equivalent weights under original parameterization during learning. The direction along the gain parameters in F¯¯𝐹\bar{{F}} captures the geometry for the magnitude of the incoming weights. We show that Riemannian metric along the magnitude of the incoming weights for the standard GLM is scaled by the norm of its input, whereas learning the gain parameters for the batch normalized and layer normalized models depends only on the magnitude of the prediction error. Learning the magnitude of incoming weights in the normalized model is therefore, more robust to the scaling of the input and its parameters than in the standard model. See Appendix for detailed derivations.
items.zh: 学习输入权重的幅度：在归一化模型中，输入权重的幅度由增益参数显式参数化。我们比较了在学习过程中更新归一化GLM中的增益参数与更新原始参数化下等效权重的幅度时模型输出的变化。F̄中沿增益参数的方向捕获了输入权重幅度的几何。我们表明，标准GLM中输入权重幅度沿黎曼度量被其输入范数缩放，而批归一化和层归一化模型的学习增益参数仅依赖于预测误差的幅度。因此，与标准模型相比，归一化模型中学习输入权重的幅度对输入及其参数的缩放更加鲁棒。详细推导见附录。

items.en: We perform experiments with layer normalization on 6 tasks, with a focus on recurrent neural networks: image-sentence ranking, question-answering, contextual language modelling, generative modelling, handwriting sequence generation and MNIST classification. Unless otherwise noted, the default initialization of layer normalization is to set the adaptive gains to 111 and the biases to 00 in the experiments.
items.zh: 我们在6个任务上进行了层归一化实验，重点放在循环神经网络上：图像-句子排序、问答、上下文语言建模、生成建模、手写序列生成和MNIST分类。除非另有说明，实验中层归一化的默认初始化是将自适应增益设为1，偏置设为0。

full.sec: 6.1 Order embeddings of images and language
full.secZh: 6.1 图像与语言的顺序嵌入

items.en: In this experiment, we apply layer normalization to the recently proposed order-embeddings model of Vendrov et al. [2016] for learning a joint embedding space of images and sentences. We follow the same experimental protocol as Vendrov et al. [2016] and modify their publicly available code to incorporate layer normalization 111https://github.com/ivendrov/order-embedding which utilizes Theano [Team et al., 2016]. Images and sentences from the Microsoft COCO dataset [Lin et al., 2014] are embedded into a common vector space, where a GRU [Cho et al., 2014] is used to encode sentences and the outputs of a pre-trained VGG ConvNet [Simonyan and Zisserman, 2015] (10-crop) are used to encode images. The order-embedding model represents images and sentences as a 2-level partial ordering and replaces the cosine similarity scoring function used in Kiros et al. [2014] with an asymmetric one.
items.zh: 在本实验中，我们将层归一化应用于最近Vendrov等人[2016]提出的用于学习图像和句子联合嵌入空间的顺序嵌入模型。我们遵循与Vendrov等人[2016]相同的实验协议，并修改其公开可用的代码以加入层归一化（https://github.com/ivendrov/order-embedding），该代码使用Theano[Team et al., 2016]。来自Microsoft COCO数据集[Lin et al., 2014]的图像和句子被嵌入到一个公共向量空间中，其中使用GRU[Cho et al., 2014]编码句子，使用预训练的VGG ConvNet[Simonyan and Zisserman, 2015]（10-crop）的输出编码图像。顺序嵌入模型将图像和句子表示为2级偏序，并用非对称评分函数替换Kiros等人[2014]中使用的余弦相似度评分函数。

items.en: We trained two models: the baseline order-embedding model as well as the same model with layer normalization applied to the GRU. After every 300 iterations, we compute Recall@K (R@K) values on a held out validation set and save the model whenever R@K improves. The best performing models are then evaluated on 5 separate test sets, each containing 1000 images and 5000 captions, for which the mean results are reported. Both models use Adam [Kingma and Ba, 2014] with the same initial hyperparameters and both models are trained using the same architectural choices as used in Vendrov et al. [2016]. We refer the reader to the appendix for a description of how layer normalization is applied to GRU.
items.zh: 我们训练了两个模型：基线顺序嵌入模型以及相同模型但将层归一化应用于GRU。每300次迭代后，我们在保留的验证集上计算Recall@K（R@K）值，并在R@K改善时保存模型。然后，在5个独立的测试集上评估最佳模型，每个测试集包含1000张图像和5000个标题，报告平均结果。两个模型均使用Adam[Kingma and Ba, 2014]和相同的初始超参数，并且两个模型均使用与Vendrov等人[2016]相同的架构选择进行训练。关于层归一化如何应用于GRU的描述，请读者参考附录。

full.sec: 6.2 Teaching machines to read and comprehend

items.capEn: Figure 2: Validation curves for the attentive reader model. BN results are taken from [Cooijmans et al., 2016].
items.capZh: 图2：注意力读取器模型的验证曲线。BN结果取自[Cooijmans et al., 2016]。

items.en: In order to compare layer normalization to the recently proposed recurrent batch normalization [Cooijmans et al., 2016], we train an unidirectional attentive reader model on the CNN corpus both introduced by Hermann et al. [2015]. This is a question-answering task where a query description about a passage must be answered by filling in a blank. The data is anonymized such that entities are given randomized tokens to prevent degenerate solutions, which are consistently permuted during training and evaluation. We follow the same experimental protocol as Cooijmans et al. [2016] and modify their public code to incorporate layer normalization 222https://github.com/cooijmanstim/Attentive_reader/tree/bn which uses Theano [Team et al., 2016]. We obtained the pre-processed dataset used by Cooijmans et al. [2016] which differs from the original experiments of Hermann et al. [2015] in that each passage is limited to 4 sentences. In Cooijmans et al. [2016], two variants of recurrent batch normalization are used: one where BN is only applied to the LSTM while the other applies BN everywhere throughout the model. In our experiment, we only apply layer normalization within the LSTM.
items.zh: 为了将层归一化与最近提出的循环批归一化 [Cooijmans et al., 2016] 进行比较，我们在 Hermann 等人 [2015] 提出的 CNN 语料库上训练了一个单向注意力阅读器模型。这是一个问答任务，需要根据对段落的查询描述，通过填空来回答。数据经过匿名化处理，实体被赋予随机化令牌以防止退化解，这些令牌在训练和评估期间会一致地置换。我们遵循与 Cooijmans 等人 [2016] 相同的实验协议，并修改其公开代码以加入层归一化 222https://github.com/cooijmanstim/Attentive_reader/tree/bn，该代码使用 Theano [Team et al., 2016]。我们获得了 Cooijmans 等人 [2016] 使用的预处理数据集，该数据集与 Hermann 等人 [2015] 的原始实验不同，每个段落被限制为 4 个句子。在 Cooijmans 等人 [2016] 中，使用了两种循环批归一化变体：一种仅将 BN 应用于 LSTM，另一种则将 BN 应用于整个模型。在我们的实验中，我们仅在 LSTM 内部应用层归一化。

items.en: The results of this experiment are shown in Figure 2. We observe that layer normalization not only trains faster but converges to a better validation result over both the baseline and BN variants. In Cooijmans et al. [2016], it is argued that the scale parameter in BN must be carefully chosen and is set to 0.1 in their experiments. We experimented with layer normalization for both 1.0 and 0.1 scale initialization and found that the former model performed significantly better. This demonstrates that layer normalization is not sensitive to the initial scale in the same way that recurrent BN is. 333We only produce results on the validation set, as in the case of Cooijmans et al. [2016]
items.zh: 该实验的结果如图 2 所示。我们观察到，层归一化不仅训练更快，而且收敛到比基线和 BN 变体更好的验证结果。在 Cooijmans 等人 [2016] 中，他们认为 BN 中的尺度参数必须仔细选择，并在其实验中设置为 0.1。我们尝试了尺度初始化为 1.0 和 0.1 的层归一化，发现前者模型表现显著更好。这表明层归一化不像循环 BN 那样对初始尺度敏感。333我们仅提供验证集上的结果，与 Cooijmans 等人 [2016] 的情况一致。

items.en: Skip-thoughts [Kiros et al., 2015] is a generalization of the skip-gram model [Mikolov et al., 2013] for learning unsupervised distributed sentence representations. Given contiguous text, a sentence is encoded with a encoder RNN and decoder RNNs are used to predict the surrounding sentences. Kiros et al. [2015] showed that this model could produce generic sentence representations that perform well on several tasks without being fine-tuned. However, training this model is time-consuming, requiring several days of training in order to produce meaningful results.
items.zh: Skip-thoughts [Kiros et al., 2015] 是 skip-gram 模型 [Mikolov et al., 2013] 的一种泛化，用于学习无监督的分布式句子表示。给定连续文本，一个句子通过编码器 RNN 进行编码，并使用解码器 RNN 来预测周围的句子。Kiros 等人 [2015] 表明，该模型可以生成通用的句子表示，在多个任务上表现良好而无需微调。然而，训练该模型非常耗时，需要数天的训练才能产生有意义的结果。

items.en: In this experiment we determine to what effect layer normalization can speed up training. Using the publicly available code of Kiros et al. [2015] 444https://github.com/ryankiros/skip-thoughts, we train two models on the BookCorpus dataset [Zhu et al., 2015]: one with and one without layer normalization. These experiments are performed with Theano [Team et al., 2016]. We adhere to the experimental setup used in Kiros et al. [2015], training a 2400-dimensional sentence encoder with the same hyperparameters. Given the size of the states used, it is conceivable layer normalization would produce slower per-iteration updates than without. However, we found that provided CNMeM 555https://github.com/NVIDIA/cnmem is used, there was no significant difference between the two models. We checkpoint both models after every 50,000 iterations and evaluate their performance on five tasks: semantic-relatedness (SICK) [Marelli et al., 2014], movie review sentiment (MR) [Pang and Lee, 2005], customer product reviews (CR) [Hu and Liu, 2004], subjectivity/objectivity classification (SUBJ) [Pang and Lee, 2004] and opinion polarity (MPQA) [Wiebe et al., 2005]. We plot the performance of both models for each checkpoint on all tasks to determine whether the performance rate can be improved with LN.
items.zh: 在本实验中，我们确定层归一化能在多大程度上加速训练。使用 Kiros 等人 [2015] 的公开代码 444https://github.com/ryankiros/skip-thoughts，我们在 BookCorpus 数据集 [Zhu et al., 2015] 上训练了两个模型：一个使用层归一化，另一个不使用。这些实验使用 Theano [Team et al., 2016] 进行。我们遵循 Kiros 等人 [2015] 使用的实验设置，训练了一个 2400 维的句子编码器，并使用相同的超参数。考虑到所用状态的大小，可以想象层归一化会产生比没有时更慢的每次迭代更新。然而，我们发现，只要使用 CNMeM 555https://github.com/NVIDIA/cnmem，两个模型之间没有显著差异。我们每 50,000 次迭代对两个模型进行检查点保存，并在五个任务上评估其性能：语义相关性 (SICK) [Marelli et al., 2014]、电影评论情感 (MR) [Pang and Lee, 2005]、客户产品评论 (CR) [Hu and Liu, 2004]、主观性/客观性分类 (SUBJ) [Pang and Lee, 2004] 和观点极性 (MPQA) [Wiebe et al., 2005]。我们绘制了两个模型在每个检查点上的所有任务性能，以确定使用 LN 是否能提高性能率。

items.en: The experimental results are illustrated in Figure 3. We observe that applying layer normalization results both in speedup over the baseline as well as better final results after 1M iterations are performed as shown in Table 3. We also let the model with layer normalization train for a total of a month, resulting in further performance gains across all but one task. We note that the performance differences between the original reported results and ours are likely due to the fact that the publicly available code does not condition at each timestep of the decoder, where the original model does.
items.zh: 实验结果如图 3 所示。我们观察到，应用层归一化不仅比基线加速，而且在执行 1M 次迭代后得到更好的最终结果，如表 3 所示。我们还让带有层归一化的模型训练了整整一个月，结果在所有任务（除一个外）上都有进一步的性能提升。我们注意到，原始报告结果与我们的结果之间的性能差异很可能是因为公开代码没有在解码器的每个时间步进行条件处理，而原始模型是这样做的。

items.capEn: Figure 4: DRAW model test negative log likelihood with and without layer normalization.
items.capZh: 图 4：使用和不使用层归一化的 DRAW 模型测试负对数似然。

items.en: We also experimented with the generative modeling on the MNIST dataset. Deep Recurrent Attention Writer (DRAW) [Gregor et al., 2015] has previously achieved the state-of-the-art performance on modeling the distribution of MNIST digits. The model uses a differential attention mechanism and a recurrent neural network to sequentially generate pieces of an image. We evaluate the effect of layer normalization on a DRAW model using 64 glimpses and 256 LSTM hidden units. The model is trained with the default setting of Adam [Kingma and Ba, 2014] optimizer and the minibatch size of 128. Previous publications on binarized MNIST have used various training protocols to generate their datasets. In this experiment, we used the fixed binarization from Larochelle and Murray [2011]. The dataset has been split into 50,000 training, 10,000 validation and 10,000 test images.
items.zh: 我们还在 MNIST 数据集上进行了生成建模实验。深度循环注意力写入器 (DRAW) [Gregor et al., 2015] 先前在建模 MNIST 数字分布方面达到了最先进的性能。该模型使用差分注意力机制和循环神经网络顺序生成图像的各个部分。我们评估了层归一化对 DRAW 模型的影响，该模型使用 64 个 glimpses 和 256 个 LSTM 隐藏单元。模型使用 Adam [Kingma and Ba, 2014] 优化器的默认设置和小批量大小 128 进行训练。先前关于二值化 MNIST 的出版物使用了各种训练协议来生成数据集。在本实验中，我们使用了 Larochelle 和 Murray [2011] 的固定二值化。数据集已分为 50,000 个训练图像、10,000 个验证图像和 10,000 个测试图像。

items.capEn: Figure 5: Handwriting sequence generation model negative log likelihood with and without layer normalization. The models are trained with mini-batch size of 8 and sequence length of 500,
items.capZh: 图 5：使用和不使用层归一化的手写序列生成模型负对数似然。模型使用小批量大小 8 和序列长度 500 进行训练。

items.en: The previous experiments mostly examine RNNs on NLP tasks whose lengths are in the range of 10 to 40. To show the effectiveness of layer normalization on longer sequences, we performed handwriting generation tasks using the IAM Online Handwriting Database [Liwicki and Bunke, 2005]. IAM-OnDB consists of handwritten lines collected from 221 different writers. When given the input character string, the goal is to predict a sequence of x and y pen co-ordinates of the corresponding handwriting line on the whiteboard. There are, in total, 12179 handwriting line sequences. The input string is typically more than 25 characters and the average handwriting line has a length around 700.
items.zh: 之前的实验主要检查 RNN 在长度范围为 10 到 40 的 NLP 任务上的表现。为了展示层归一化在更长序列上的有效性，我们使用 IAM 在线手写数据库 [Liwicki and Bunke, 2005] 执行了手写生成任务。IAM-OnDB 包含来自 221 位不同作者的手写行。给定输入字符字符串，目标是预测白板上相应手写行的 x 和 y 笔坐标序列。总共有 12179 个手写行序列。输入字符串通常超过 25 个字符，平均手写行长度约为 700。

items.en: We used the same model architecture as in Section (5.2) of Graves [2013]. The model architecture consists of three hidden layers of 400 LSTM cells, which produce 20 bivariate Gaussian mixture components at the output layer, and a size 3 input layer. The character sequence was encoded with one-hot vectors, and hence the window vectors were size 57. A mixture of 10 Gaussian functions was used for the window parameters, requiring a size 30 parameter vector. The total number of weights was increased to approximately 3.7M. The model is trained using mini-batches of size 8 and the Adam [Kingma and Ba, 2014] optimizer.
items.zh: 我们使用了与 Graves [2013] 第 (5.2) 节相同的模型架构。模型架构由三个隐藏层组成，每层 400 个 LSTM 细胞，在输出层产生 20 个双变量高斯混合分量，以及一个大小为 3 的输入层。字符序列用独热向量编码，因此窗口向量大小为 57。窗口参数使用了 10 个高斯函数的混合，需要大小为 30 的参数向量。权重总数增加到约 3.7M。模型使用小批量大小 8 和 Adam [Kingma and Ba, 2014] 优化器进行训练。

items.en: The combination of small mini-batch size and very long sequences makes it important to have very stable hidden dynamics. Figure 5 shows that layer normalization converges to a comparable log likelihood as the baseline model but is much faster.
items.zh: 小批量大小小且序列非常长，这使得拥有非常稳定的隐藏动态非常重要。图 5 显示，层归一化收敛到与基线模型相当的负对数似然，但速度更快。

items.en: In addition to RNNs, we investigated layer normalization in feed-forward networks. We show how layer normalization compares with batch normalization on the well-studied permutation invariant MNIST classification problem. From the previous analysis, layer normalization is invariant to input re-scaling which is desirable for the internal hidden layers. But this is unnecessary for the logit outputs where the prediction confidence is determined by the scale of the logits. We only apply layer normalization to the fully-connected hidden layers that excludes the last softmax layer.
items.zh: 除了 RNN，我们还研究了前馈网络中的层归一化。我们展示了层归一化与批归一化在广泛研究的置换不变 MNIST 分类问题上的比较。从之前的分析来看，层归一化对输入重新缩放具有不变性，这对于内部隐藏层是可取的。但对于 logit 输出，预测置信度由 logit 的尺度决定，这种不变性是不必要的。我们仅将层归一化应用于全连接隐藏层，不包括最后的 softmax 层。

items.capEn: Figure 6: Permutation invariant MNIST 784-1000-1000-10 model negative log likelihood and test error with layer normalization and batch normalization. (Left) The models are trained with batch-size of 128. (Right) The models are trained with batch-size of 4.
items.capZh: 图 6：使用层归一化和批归一化的置换不变 MNIST 784-1000-1000-10 模型负对数似然和测试误差。（左）模型使用批量大小 128 进行训练。（右）模型使用批量大小 4 进行训练。

items.en: All the models were trained using 55000 training data points and the Adam [Kingma and Ba, 2014] optimizer. For the smaller batch-size, the variance term for batch normalization is computed using the unbiased estimator. The experimental results from Figure 6 highlight that layer normalization is robust to the batch-sizes and exhibits a faster training convergence comparing to batch normalization that is applied to all layers.
items.zh: 所有模型均使用 55000 个训练数据点和 Adam [Kingma and Ba, 2014] 优化器进行训练。对于较小的批量大小，批归一化的方差项使用无偏估计量计算。图 6 的实验结果强调，层归一化对批量大小具有鲁棒性，并且与应用于所有层的批归一化相比，表现出更快的训练收敛速度。

items.en: We have also experimented with convolutional neural networks. In our preliminary experiments, we observed that layer normalization offers a speedup over the baseline model without normalization, but batch normalization outperforms the other methods. With fully connected layers, all the hidden units in a layer tend to make similar contributions to the final prediction and re-centering and re-scaling the summed inputs to a layer works well. However, the assumption of similar contributions is no longer true for convolutional neural networks. The large number of the hidden units whose receptive fields lie near the boundary of the image are rarely turned on and thus have very different statistics from the rest of the hidden units within the same layer. We think further research is needed to make layer normalization work well in ConvNets.
items.zh: 我们还尝试了卷积神经网络。在初步实验中，我们观察到层归一化相比无归一化的基线模型能加速训练，但批归一化优于其他方法。对于全连接层，一层中的所有隐藏单元往往对最终预测做出相似贡献，因此对层的求和输入进行重新中心和重新缩放效果良好。然而，对于卷积神经网络，相似贡献的假设不再成立。大量感受野位于图像边界附近的隐藏单元很少被激活，因此与同一层中其他隐藏单元的统计特性差异很大。我们认为需要进一步研究才能使层归一化在卷积网络中有效工作。

items.en: In this paper, we introduced layer normalization to speed-up the training of neural networks. We provided a theoretical analysis that compared the invariance properties of layer normalization with batch normalization and weight normalization. We showed that layer normalization is invariant to per training-case feature shifting and scaling.
items.zh: 在本文中，我们引入了层归一化以加速神经网络的训练。我们提供了理论分析，比较了层归一化与批归一化和权重归一化的不变性。我们表明，层归一化对每个训练样本的特征平移和缩放具有不变性。

items.en: Empirically, we showed that recurrent neural networks benefit the most from the proposed method especially for long sequences and small mini-batches.
items.zh: 实验上，我们表明循环神经网络从所提出的方法中获益最多，尤其是在长序列和小批量情况下。

items.en: This research was funded by grants from NSERC, CFI, and Google.
items.zh: 本研究由NSERC、CFI和Google的资助支持。
